title: Veterans of the LGBT Ban: Financial Recognition Scheme

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Guidance on the LGBT Financial Recognition Scheme for veterans who served under, and were impacted by, the Ban on LGBT personnel in HM Armed Forces from 1967 to 2000. LGBT Financial Recognition Scheme Please find below the data detailing scheme progress which will be shared on a monthly basis.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Total individual applicants*: 1412 *Applicants may have more than one case due to there being two payment types. Total decisions made on cases: 1291 Value of total payments made: £40,575,500 The LGBT Financial Recognition Scheme was recommended by the LGBT Veterans Independent Review which was published in July 2023.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – Guidance: Veterans of the LGBT Ban: Financial Recognition Scheme
